$schema_note: Sprint amendment for the Sales by Channel post-release polish requested on 2026-07-21.
theme: Polish the released Sales by Channel feature by adding admin mapping edits, removing marked LY/goal UI, and adding sortable channel headers.

tasks.title: ADJUSTMENT: Allow admins to edit existing sales channel mappings
requirements: Existing mappings rows must expose an Edit action.
Edit mode must allow changing SellerCloud Company, SellerCloud Channel, QB Channel, Active status, and optional notes.
Save must use the admin-only Supabase mutation and refresh mapping and Sales by Channel query caches.
Cancel must exit edit mode without changing row values.

tasks.title: ADJUSTMENT: Remove marked Sales by Channel LY and top-goal UI sections
requirements: Remove the LY comparison subtitle from the MTD Sales KPI.
Remove the top-level Goal KPI card.
Remove LY MTD and YoY columns from the Channel pace table.
Keep per-channel Goal input, Projected, Daily lift, and Status columns.

tasks.title: ADJUSTMENT: Add click-to-sort headers for Sales by Channel remaining columns
requirements: Remaining Channel pace headers must sort rows when clicked.
Headers must cover Channel, MTD, Goal, Projected, Daily lift, and Status.
Repeated header clicks must toggle ascending and descending direction.
Add mapping rows should remain below mapped channel rows.

tasks.title: ADJUSTMENT: Document sprint amendment and verification for Sales by Channel polish
requirements: Commit this amendment document with implementation evidence.
Run focused tests, full tests, and production build before completion.

completion_gates: Focused Sales by Channel tests pass.
Asana adjustment tasks are updated with evidence.

verification.evidence: tsc and Vite production build completed
